svg.title: Robot power distribution from 230 V AC mains through battery to 24 V, 5 V and 3.3 V rails
svg.desc: Mains feeds an enclosed AC/DC charger which charges a 24 V lead-acid battery. Battery positive passes through two missing safety components (no fuse, no disconnect/E-stop) to a 24 V bus feeding two ZBLD motor drivers and a buck converter to 5 V for the Raspberry Pi 5, then a 3.3 V logic rail for AS5040 encoders and the MPU6500 IMU.

g.text: browns out if < 5 A at boot
